meaning: adj.[地质]铁铝氧石的,铁矾土的
examples: The chemical composition, petrographic analysis and dispersing property of kinds of bauxitic clay are compared.
Base on the recent system study of Daheishan copper deposits, we built a new type of copper deposits - bauxitic mudstone-type.
The bauxitic clay sample from Hunan has good dispersing property, suitable for the producing process that raw material must be pretreated to well-distributed slurry.
